Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x3100 "ZAGAMISSION-0900-3100" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$34 sta $01 jsr $0900 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Zaga Mission.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0900 which: 1. Copies 512 bytes of data from $0940 down to $0200 so that the dump can start at $0400 2. Sets the accumulator to zero 3. Jumps to the code located at $022E, which is the tail end of the original loader. This sets the port B data direction register ($DD03) to the value of the accumulator ($00), copies some data to the zero page and finally jumps to the entry point ($3100).
